field.name: title
field.description: Default title shown in the notification popup. Can be overridden per-flow node.

field.name: message
field.placeholder: e.g. You have a new email from {{from}}
field.description: Default body text of the notification. Use {{field}} placeholders to inject values from the trigger output (e.g. {{from}}, {{subject}}).

field.name: icon
field.description: Optional emoji or icon character shown alongside the notification title.

menu.title: Behavior

field.name: sound_enabled
field.description: Play a system sound when a notification is triggered.

field.name: log_notifications
field.description: Write notification events to the workflow log for debugging and audit.

field.name: max_message_length
field.description: Truncate long messages to this character limit before displaying the notification.

field.name: notification_level
field.description: Severity level that controls the visual style of the notification badge in the UI.

menu.info: Settings apply globally to all flows using this plugin. Per-node overrides can be set in the flow node configuration panel.
